title: RTS Map Command Recruits
description: Addon for villager recruits that turns map control into true RTS group commanding: click-to-move, queued waypoints, attack/strategic-fire orders, stance/fire controls, and formation hotkeys.
body:
You can support me through- https://ko-fi.com/knightmare61825

RTS Map Command Recruits is an addon for the Recruits mod that gives you Total War-style map control over recruit armies: one map icon can represent a full group, with click-to-move, waypoints, formation control, combat commands, and strategic fire control.

## Group-Based Map Commanding:

- Each recruit group appears as a single tactical icon on the world map.
- Split group handling: if members are far apart, they can appear as separate controllable sub-groups.
- Movement arrow/path rendering from current position through queued waypoints.
- Smart Group Visuals
- Uses each group’s configured image/icon (from group setup).
- Relation outline colors:
> -     Your groups: Green
> -     Allies: Blue
> -     Neutral: Gray
> -     Enemies: Red
- Icon size scales better with map zoom.

## Multiplayer-Safe Order System:

- Server-authoritative orders and validations.
- Selection/order stability improvements for moving/splitting groups.
- Stuck orders/arrows auto-cleaned to prevent command-lock states.

## How To Use (Map Controls):

### Selection & Basic Orders
- Left Click group icon: select group
- C: clear selected group
- Right Click map: move selected group
- Shift + Right Click: queue waypoints

### Attack & Fire Commands
- Ctrl + Right Click on enemy group icon: attack that group
- Ctrl + J + Right Click on map: strategic fire at that position
- Ctrl + K: hold/cancel strategic fire for selected group

### Behavior / Stance (selected group)
- 1 = Passive
- 2 = Neutral
- 3 = Aggressive
- 4 = Hold Fire
- 5 = Fire At Will
- 6 = Wander movement mode

### Formation Controls
- Ctrl + Tab: cycle formation
- Ctrl + Shift + Tab: cycle formation backward

### Numpad direct formation binds:
- KP1 Circle
- KP2 H Circle
- KP3 Square
- KP4 H Square
- KP5 Line
- KP6 Triangle
- KP7 V Form
- KP8 March
- KP9 No Formation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SH7f4oB8rpg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Other UI Controls
- Tab / Shift+Tab: cycle selected groups
- U: toggle map overlay text

## Visibility & Command Limits
- Groups must be in the correct world/dimension and visible per server-side checks.
- Commanding can be limited by configurable radius from player.
- Visibility/control behavior respects render-distance-style constraints for fairness.

## Configurable Server Settings
In the server config:
- commandRadiusBlocks – max command distance from player to group anchor
- arrivalDistance – waypoint completion distance
- continueMarchWhenInCombat – continue marching vs stop-and-fight behavior

You can support me through- https://ko-fi.com/knightmare61825
